peptides

GHRP-6

GH secretagogue peptide studied for hormonal and metabolic research applications.

$39.99CAD
Size / Amount
Quantity
1
Research Areas
hormonalmetabolic

GHRP-6 (Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide 6) is a synthetic met-enkephalin analogue that strongly stimulates GH secretion in research models. It acts on ghrelin receptors and has been widely studied in neuroendocrinology.

Research has explored its effects on GH pulsatility, appetite regulation, and metabolic processes. Often studied in combination with GHRH analogues for synergistic effects.

All Popular Peptides products are manufactured to research-grade standards with full analytical documentation.

⚠️ Research Use Only. This compound is intended for in vitro research and laboratory use only. Not for human or veterinary consumption.
